description_long: This is a round chocolate cake with a smooth, marbled brown surface and a single white candle placed at its center. The top of the cake is decorated with eight dollops of white whipped cream, each topped with a red cherry and a brown stem. Along the side and partially on the top, blue 3D text reading 'The cake is a lie' is visible, referencing a popular phrase from the video game Portal. The cake appears to be a single-tiered dessert with a soft, moist texture, and no visible container or plate beneath it. The overall style is playful and themed, with a focus on the iconic look from gaming culture. The cake is suitable for display or celebration in an urban environment, such as a park or street festival.
description: A round chocolate cake with whipped cream, cherries, a single candle, and blue 3D text reading 'The cake is a lie' on the side. The cake has a playful, themed decoration and no visible container.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake's marbled chocolate surface, whipped cream and cherry decorations, central candle, and the blue 3D text 'The cake is a lie' clearly visible on the right side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the top decorations and candle, with the blue 3D text partially visible and extending along the left side of the cake.
description_view_2: The left side of the cake is shown, with the blue 3D text 'The cake is a lie' more prominent and the cherry decorations clearly visible.
description_view_3: The text 'The cake is a lie' is seen partially across the top, with the candle and cherry decorations visible from a slightly elevated angle.
